meta.title: FRAME/0 — Co-direct with the machine
meta.description: Video that answers back. FRAME/0 isn't a prompt box — it's a director's chair.
meta.og_description: An AI film instrument. A director, not a prompt.

hero.lead: FRAME/0 isn't a prompt box. It's a director's chair. You bring intent, pacing, mood; the machine handles pixels, lens, continuity.

pillars.direction_body: You bring intent, mood, pacing. The tool shoots. Prompts are scaffolding, not the language.
pillars.continuity_body: Characters, lighting, time stay consistent across shots. Memory isn't a bonus — it's the premise.
pillars.credit_body: Fan one prompt across models and see them side-by-side. Know which model, which params.

archive.lead: Every asset you've generated — videos and images. Search, filter, favorite, send back to the studio in one click.
